titleStmt.title: SII 22.100: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 100. (A.R. No. 100 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE AKHILĀṆḌĒŚVARĪ SHRINE. RĀJ. VĪRARĀJĒNDRA—6th YEAR (A.D. 1068-69)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Vīramē tuṇaiyāgavum etc. It records a grant tax free, of 500 kuḻi of land in the dēvadāna village Tagaḍi and another 40 kuḻi (as house site and garden ?) besides some dry land in addition as kappaḍa vīśam (?) by the sthānattār of the temple of Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-Mahādēva at Vīrarājēndrapuram on the northern bank of the Peṇṇai in Rājēndra-vaḷanāḍu, to one Araṅgaṉ Śēndaṉ of Akkaṇavallam, who is called the nagarakkaṇakkaṉ of the place, for looking after all the accounts of the temple. Among the temple authorities mention is made of a certain Mahāvratin Lakulīśvara-Paṇḍita the head of a maṭha attached to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . viramey tuṇaiyākavu n=tiyākame Aṇiyākavum ceṅ koloccik karuṅkali kaṭittu kūṭalarcaṅkamattāhavama
llaṉai Aiñcuvittu vikkalaṉaiyum ciṅkaṇaṉaiyum Uṭaipuṟaṅkaṇṭu maṟṟavaṉ mahādeviyaro
ṭum vastuvāhanaṅ kaikkoṇṭu Irukālāvatum porkaḷaṅ kunittu kuṟitta kaḷattāhavamallaṉai Aiñcivittu
tannuṭaṉ piṟan=ta munnavar viratam muṭittu veṅkaināṭu kaikkoṇṭu vijaiyahaviṣekam paṇ
ṇi virasiṅhāsanattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷina kovi rājakesari panmarāna Uṭai
yār śrī virarājentradevaṟkku yāṇṭu 6Āvatu rājentravaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭakarai virarāje
ntrapurattu Uṭaiyār tirukkaṟṟaḷimahādevar maṭamuṭaiya śrī mahaāvrati lakuḷi(śa)śvara paṇḍitanum Ittevatānattil
sattrattil piṭārarkaḷum devarkanmikaḷ ṇi nibandakkāṟarum Uṭpaṭṭa In=tasthānattuḷḷom Ikkoyilukku
ṭṭikkaṇ yaninṟārnallāṉ maiyil
ka Ivvirarājentrapurattu nakarakkaṇakkan Akkaṇavallamuṭaiyān Araṅkaṉ cen=taṉukku cantrāditta
vaṟ kāṇiyāka ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu Itdevar tevatānam Innāṭṭu peṇṇait tenkarai
t takaṭit tevatānattil kiḻvelañceṟu taṭi Onṟināl patinaṟu cāṇ kolāl kuḻi 5 100 Ikkuḻi Ai
ññūṟum Ivanukku Akamaṉaiyum paṭappaiyumāka Ittakaṭi nattam tevatānat til paḻaiya maṭa
ttukku vaṭakkil kallukku vaṭakku kuḻi nāṟpatum muṟṟūṭṭum Iṟaiyili Uṇṭaṉubhavittu Ikko
yil nokkivan=ta Eppe(o)ṟpaṭṭa kaṇakkum Eḻutakkaṭavanākavum Ivaṉukku kappaṭavicattukku tiruva
ṇṇāmalaivatikku meṟkku cattiyāśriya kulakālavāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Ira
ṇṭā ṭaiya puñcai viḷainila Aṉubhavikkakaṭa
vānākavum Ivvaraṅkan cen=taṉukkum Ivan vaṟkkattārkkum cantrātitta vaṟk kāṇiyāka ceytu kuṭutto
m Ivvilakuḷiśvarapaṇḍitan nuḷḷiṭṭa sthāṉattom Itu śrī panmāyeśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 22.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
